title: We need tech news sources which exclude AI
abstract:
Its now clear that we need to preserve tech press for non AI related things. Techmeme for example is now completely overrun with AI stories.

HN is getting closer to that every day.

If AI kickback deals, phony new model ratings, high RAM prices and your surprise at how you think you coded somethi
abstract_zh:
现在很明显我们需要保留tech press来报道非AI相关的事情。例如，Techmeme现在已经完全被AI新闻占据了。
HN每天都在向这种情况靠近。
如果AI回退交易、虚假新模型评级、高内存价格以及你对代码的惊讶程度等等。
